<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    const banners = document.querySelectorAll('.banner-esquerda, .banner-direita');
    let alturaFixa = null;
	
    function getActivePlayer() {
        // Prioriza player de rádio se visível
        const radio = document.querySelector('.aba-conteudo[style*="display: block"] .radio-container.responsive-player');
        if (radio && radio.offsetParent !== null) {
            return radio;
        }

        // Senão retorna o iframe ativo dentro da aba visível
        const iframe = document.querySelector('.aba-conteudo[style*="display: block"] iframe');
        if (iframe && iframe.offsetParent !== null) {
            return iframe;
        }

        return null;
    }

    function ajustarAlturaBanners() {
        const player = getActivePlayer();
        if (!player) return;
        const altura = player.offsetHeight;
        banners.forEach(banner => {
            banner.style.height = altura + 'px';
        });
    }

    function capturarAlturaInicial() {
        const player = getActivePlayer();
        if (player && !alturaFixa) {
            setTimeout(() => {
                alturaFixa = player.offsetHeight;
                ajustarAlturaBanners();
            }, 300);
        }
    }

    const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(() => {
        ajustarAlturaBanners();
    });

    function observarIframeAtivo() {
        const player = getActivePlayer();
        if (player) {
            resizeObserver.disconnect();
            resizeObserver.observe(player);
        }
    }

    const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('.abas-nav a');
    const contents = document.querySelectorAll('.aba-conteudo');
   

 const bannersData = [] || {};
   
	function extrairUrlImagem(imagem) {
        if (!imagem) return '';
        if (typeof imagem === 'object' && imagem.url) return imagem.url;
        return imagem;
    }

    /*function pauseAndResetMediaIn(element) {
        if (!element) return;
        element.querySelectorAll('audio, video').forEach(media => {
            if (!media.paused) media.pause();
        });
    }

    function restoreMediaIn(element) {
       
    }*/
	  function pauseAndResetMediaIn(element) {
            if (!element) return;
            element.querySelectorAll('audio, video').forEach(media => {
                if (!media.paused) media.pause();
            });
            element.querySelectorAll('iframe').forEach(iframe => {
                iframe.dataset.originalSrc = iframe.dataset.originalSrc || iframe.src;
                iframe.src = '';
            });
        }

        function restoreMediaIn(element) {
            if (!element) return;
            element.querySelectorAll('iframe').forEach(iframe => {
                if (iframe.dataset.originalSrc) {
                    iframe.src = iframe.dataset.originalSrc;
                }
            });
        }

    function atualizarBanners(slug) {
        const containerEsq = document.querySelector('.banner-esquerda');
        const containerDir = document.querySelector('.banner-direita');
        const bannerMobileContainer = document.querySelector('.banner-mobile');

          const data = bannersData[slug] || {};
        const ativa = data.ativa || false;

        const bannerEsq = data.esq || null;
        const bannerDir = data.dir || null;
        const bannerMobile = data.mobile || null;
        const linkEsq = data.link_esq || '#';
        const linkDir = data.link_dir || '#';
        const linkMobile = data.link_mobile || '#';

        const bgEsq = data.bkg_ld_esq || '#000';
        const bgDir = data.bkg_ld_dir || '#000';
        const bgMobile = data.bkg_ld_mobile || '#000';

        if (containerEsq) {
            if (ativa && bannerEsq) {
                const url = extrairUrlImagem(bannerEsq);
                containerEsq.innerHTML = url
                    ? `<a href="${linkEsq}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><img decoding="async" src="${url}" alt="Banner Esquerdo"></a>`
                    : `<div class="banner-fallback" style="background:${bgEsq};"></div>`;
                containerEsq.style.backgroundColor = bgEsq;
                containerEsq.style.display = 'flex';
            } else {
                containerEsq.innerHTML = `<div class="banner-fallback" style="background:${bgEsq};"></div>`;
                containerEsq.style.backgroundColor = bgEsq;
                containerEsq.style.display = 'flex';
            }
        }

        if (containerDir) {
            if (ativa && bannerDir) {
                const url = extrairUrlImagem(bannerDir);
                containerDir.innerHTML = url
                    ? `<a href="${linkDir}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><img decoding="async" src="${url}" alt="Banner Direito"></a>`
                    : `<div class="banner-fallback" style="background:${bgDir};"></div>`;
                containerDir.style.backgroundColor = bgDir;
                containerDir.style.display = 'flex';
            } else {
                containerDir.innerHTML = `<div class="banner-fallback" style="background:${bgDir};"></div>`;
                containerDir.style.backgroundColor = bgDir;
                containerDir.style.display = 'flex';
            }
        }

        if (bannerMobileContainer) {
            if (ativa && bannerMobile) {
                const url = extrairUrlImagem(bannerMobile);
                bannerMobileContainer.style.backgroundColor = bgMobile;

                if (url) {
                    if (linkMobile) {
                        bannerMobileContainer.innerHTML = `<a href="${linkMobile}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><img decoding="async" src="${url}" alt="Banner Mobile"></a>`;
                    } else {
                        bannerMobileContainer.innerHTML = `<img decoding="async" src="${url}" alt="Banner Mobile">`;
                    }
                } else {
                    bannerMobileContainer.innerHTML = '';
                }
                bannerMobileContainer.style.display = 'block';
            } else {
                bannerMobileContainer.innerHTML = '';
                bannerMobileContainer.style.backgroundColor = bgMobile;
                bannerMobileContainer.style.display = 'none';
            }
        }
        

    }

    let activeTab = document.querySelector('.abas-nav a.active');

    // Se não existir aba ativa, define a primeira como ativa e exibe seu conteúdo
    if (!activeTab) {
        activeTab = document.querySelector('.abas-nav a');
        if (activeTab) {
            activeTab.classList.add('active');
            const targetId = activeTab.getAttribute('href').replace('#', '');
            const targetContent = document.getElementById(targetId);
            if (targetContent) targetContent.style.display = 'block';
        }
    }

    // Atualiza banners da aba ativa no carregamento
    if (activeTab) {
        const slugInicial = activeTab.getAttribute('href').replace('#aba-', '');
        atualizarBanners(slugInicial);
    }

    tabs.forEach(tab => {
        tab.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
            e.preventDefault();

            const href = this.getAttribute('href');
            const targetId = href.replace('#', '');
            const targetContent = document.getElementById(targetId);
            const slug = href.replace('#aba-', '');

            if (this === activeTab) {
                this.classList.remove('active');
                if (targetContent) {
                    pauseAndResetMediaIn(targetContent);
                    targetContent.style.display = 'none';
                }
                activeTab = null;
                if (logoContainer) {
                    logoContainer.innerHTML = '';
                    logoContainer.style.display = 'none';
                }
                ajustarAlturaBanners();
                return;
            }

            tabs.forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
            contents.forEach(el => {
                if (el.style.display === 'block') pauseAndResetMediaIn(el);
                el.style.display = 'none';
            });

            this.classList.add('active');
            if (targetContent) {
                targetContent.style.display = 'block';
                restoreMediaIn(targetContent);
            }

            atualizarBanners(slug);
            activeTab = this;

            ajustarAlturaBanners();
            observarIframeAtivo();
        });
    });

    // Inicialização das funções de altura e observador
    capturarAlturaInicial();
    ajustarAlturaBanners();
    observarIframeAtivo();

    // Atualiza altura dos banners ao redimensionar a janela
    window.addEventListener('resize', ajustarAlturaBanners);
});

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    var prefixo = '_rock';

    var playPauseBtn = document.getElementById('playPause' + prefixo);
    var audioPlayer = document.getElementById('audioPlayer' + prefixo);
    var playIcon = document.getElementById('playIcon' + prefixo);
    var pauseIcon = document.getElementById('pauseIcon' + prefixo);
    var loadingSpinner = document.getElementById('audio-loading' + prefixo);
    var volumeIcon = document.getElementById('volumeIcon' + prefixo);
    var volumeNormal = document.getElementById('volumeNormal' + prefixo);
    var volumeAlto = document.getElementById('volumeAlto' + prefixo);
    var volumeMudo = document.getElementById('volumeMudo' + prefixo);
    var likeButton = document.getElementById('like-icon' + prefixo);
    var dislikeButton = document.getElementById('dislike-icon' + prefixo);

    let lastVolume = 0.5;
    let isLiked = false;
    let isDisliked = false;

    audioPlayer.volume = lastVolume;
    setVolumeIcon('normal');
    hideLoading();
    togglePlayPauseIcon(false);

    // Play/Pause
    playPauseBtn.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
        e.preventDefault();
        e.stopPropagation();

        if (audioPlayer.paused || audioPlayer.readyState <= 2) {
            atualizarStream();
        } else {
            audioPlayer.pause();
            hideLoading();
            togglePlayPauseIcon(false);
        }
    });

    audioPlayer.addEventListener('playing', function () {
        hideLoading();
        togglePlayPauseIcon(true);
    });

    audioPlayer.addEventListener('pause', function () {
        hideLoading();
        togglePlayPauseIcon(false);
    });

    audioPlayer.addEventListener('ended', function () {
        togglePlayPauseIcon(false);
    });

    function atualizarStream() {
        if (!audioPlayer) return;
        showLoading();

        const baseUrl = audioPlayer.getAttribute('data-stream') || audioPlayer.src.split('?')[0];
        const timestamp = new Date().getTime();

        audioPlayer.src = `${baseUrl}?nocache=${timestamp}`;
        audioPlayer.load();

        const playPromise = audioPlayer.play();
        if (playPromise !== undefined) {
            playPromise.catch((err) => {
                hideLoading();
                console.error('Erro ao reproduzir áudio:', err);
                alert('Não foi possível reproduzir o áudio.');
            });
        }
    }

    function togglePlayPauseIcon(isPlaying) {
        if (!playIcon || !pauseIcon) return;
        playIcon.style.display = isPlaying ? 'none' : 'inline-block';
        pauseIcon.style.display = isPlaying ? 'inline-block' : 'none';
    }

    function showLoading() {
        if (loadingSpinner) loadingSpinner.style.display = 'inline-block';
    }

    function hideLoading() {
        if (loadingSpinner) loadingSpinner.style.display = 'none';
    }

    // Volume por ícone (sem slider)
    if (volumeIcon) {
        volumeIcon.addEventListener('click', () => {
            if (audioPlayer.volume > 0) {
                lastVolume = audioPlayer.volume;
                audioPlayer.volume = 0;
                setVolumeIcon('mute');
            } else {
                audioPlayer.volume = lastVolume;
                setVolumeIcon(lastVolume === 1 ? 'high' : 'normal');
            }
        });
    }

    function setVolumeIcon(state) {
        if (volumeNormal) volumeNormal.style.display = 'none';
        if (volumeAlto) volumeAlto.style.display = 'none';
        if (volumeMudo) volumeMudo.style.display = 'none';

        if (state === 'mute' && volumeMudo) volumeMudo.style.display = 'block';
        else if (state === 'high' && volumeAlto) volumeAlto.style.display = 'block';
        else if (volumeNormal) volumeNormal.style.display = 'block';
    }

    // Like/Dislike
    if (likeButton && dislikeButton) {
        likeButton.addEventListener('click', () => {
            isLiked = !isLiked;
            if (isLiked) isDisliked = false;
            updateLikeDislikeUI();
        });

        dislikeButton.addEventListener('click', () => {
            isDisliked = !isDisliked;
            if (isDisliked) isLiked = false;
            updateLikeDislikeUI();
        });
    }
	
	
   function updateLikeDislikeUI() {
       const likePath = likeButton ? likeButton.querySelector('path') : null;
        const dislikePath = dislikeButton ? dislikeButton.querySelector('path') : null;

        if (likePath) likePath.style.fill = isLiked ? '#fff' : '#1b1d1e';
        if (dislikePath) dislikePath.style.fill = isDisliked ? '#fff' : '#1b1d1e';
   }
});


	
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    const prefixo = '_rock';
    const shareBtn = document.getElementById('btn-share-' + prefixo);
    const musicTextEl = document.getElementById('current-music' + prefixo);

    if (shareBtn && musicTextEl) {
        shareBtn.addEventListener('click', function () {
            const musicText = musicTextEl.textContent.trim();
            const pageUrl = window.location.href;
            const shareText = `Ouça esta música: "${musicText}" - Link: ${pageUrl}`;

            if (navigator.share) {
                navigator.share({
                    title: 'Compartilhar música',
                    text: shareText,
                    url: pageUrl
                }).then(() => {
                    console.log('Compartilhamento realizado com sucesso!');
                }).catch((error) => {
                    alert('Erro ao compartilhar: ' + error);
                });
            } else {
                copyToClipboard(shareText);
                alert('Texto copiado para a área de transferência:\n\n' + shareText);
            }
        });
    } else {
        console.warn('Botão ou elemento de texto não encontrado para o prefixo:', prefixo);
    }

    function copyToClipboard(text) {
        if (navigator.clipboard && window.isSecureContext) {
            navigator.clipboard.writeText(text);
        } else {
            let textArea = document.createElement("textarea");
            textArea.value = text;
            textArea.style.position = "fixed";
            textArea.style.top = "-9999px";
            textArea.style.left = "-9999px";
            document.body.appendChild(textArea);
            textArea.focus();
            textArea.select();
            try {
                document.execCommand('copy');
            } catch (err) {
                console.error('Falha ao copiar para clipboard', err);
            }
            document.body.removeChild(textArea);
        }
    }
});



// 1) HARD RULE: para ROCK, sempre FM
function showTab_2(tabId, prefixo) {
  const rawPrefixo = (prefixo || '');
  let normalizedPrefix = rawPrefixo.replace(/^_+/, '');

  // normalizações que você já usava
  if (normalizedPrefix === '98_news') normalizedPrefix = 'news';

  // força FM quando for rock
  if (normalizedPrefix === '98_rock') normalizedPrefix = 'rock';
  const prefixoComUnderline = normalizedPrefix ? '_' + normalizedPrefix : '';

  // Se for rock, força o tabId para FM e nunca deixa mostrar a TV
  if (normalizedPrefix === 'rock') {
    tabId = 'FM' + prefixoComUnderline; // => 'FM_rock'
  }

  const tvId = 'TV' + prefixoComUnderline;
  const fmId = 'FM' + prefixoComUnderline;

  // Se por algum motivo vier um tabId diferente, corrija para TV/FM válidos
  if (tabId !== tvId && tabId !== fmId) {
    tabId = normalizedPrefix === 'rock' ? fmId : tvId;
  }

  // Evita ação repetida
  const currentActive = document.querySelector(`#${tvId}.active, #${fmId}.active`);
  if (currentActive && currentActive.id === tabId) return;

  // Pausa áudio do FM ao trocar
  const audioPlayer = document.getElementById('audioPlayer' + prefixoComUnderline);
  if (audioPlayer && !audioPlayer.paused) {
    audioPlayer.pause();
    const playIcon = document.getElementById('playIcon' + prefixoComUnderline);
    const pauseIcon = document.getElementById('pauseIcon' + prefixoComUnderline);
    if (playIcon && pauseIcon) {
      playIcon.style.display = 'inline-block';
      pauseIcon.style.display = 'none';
    }
  }

  // Alterna visibilidade das abas internas
  [tvId, fmId].forEach(id => {
    const el = document.getElementById(id);
    if (!el) return;
    if (id === tabId) {
      el.classList.add('active');
      el.style.display = 'block';
      el.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'false');
    } else {
      // remove iframe ao esconder (mata TV quando rock)
      const iframe = el.querySelector('iframe');
      if (iframe) iframe.remove();
      el.classList.remove('active');
      el.style.display = 'none';
      el.setAttribute('aria-hidden', 'true');
    }
  });

  // Recria iframe apenas se necessário e se NÃO for rock
  if (normalizedPrefix !== 'rock') {
    const tab = document.getElementById(tabId);
    if (tab) {
      const ytContainer = tab.querySelector('#youtubeContainer' + prefixoComUnderline);
      if (ytContainer && !ytContainer.querySelector('iframe') && ytContainer.hasAttribute('data-src')) {
        const iframe = document.createElement('iframe');
        iframe.src = ytContainer.getAttribute('data-src');
        iframe.id = 'youtubePlayer' + prefixoComUnderline;
        iframe.width = '100%';
        iframe.height = '205px';
        iframe.frameBorder = '0';
        iframe.allow = 'accelerometer; autoplay; encrypted-media; gyroscope; fullscreen';
        iframe.allowFullscreen = true;
        ytContainer.appendChild(iframe);
      }
      const dmContainer = tab.querySelector('#dailymotionContainer' + prefixoComUnderline);
      if (dmContainer && !dmContainer.querySelector('iframe') && dmContainer.hasAttribute('data-src')) {
        const iframe = document.createElement('iframe');
        iframe.src = dmContainer.getAttribute('data-src');
        iframe.id = 'dailymotionPlayer' + prefixoComUnderline;
        iframe.width = '100%';
        iframe.height = '205px';
        iframe.frameBorder = '0';
        iframe.allow = 'autoplay; fullscreen';
        iframe.allowFullscreen = true;
        dmContainer.appendChild(iframe);
      }
    }
  }

  // Atualiza botões e ícones
  const tvBtn   = document.getElementById('tvButton' + prefixoComUnderline);
  const radioBtn= document.getElementById('radioButton' + prefixoComUnderline);
  const tvIcon  = document.querySelector('#tvIcon' + prefixoComUnderline + ' path');
  const fmIcon  = document.querySelector('#fmIcon' + prefixoComUnderline + ' path');

  [tvBtn, radioBtn].forEach(btn => {
    if (btn) {
      btn.classList.remove('active');
      btn.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'false');
      btn.style.backgroundColor = '#FAF6F5';
    }
  });
  if (tvIcon) tvIcon.setAttribute('fill', '#242222');
  if (fmIcon) fmIcon.setAttribute('fill', '#242222');

  let activeBtn = null;
  let activeIcon = null;
  if (tabId === tvId) { activeBtn = tvBtn; activeIcon = tvIcon; }
  else if (tabId === fmId) { activeBtn = radioBtn; activeIcon = fmIcon; }

  if (activeBtn) {
    activeBtn.classList.add('active');
    activeBtn.setAttribute('aria-selected', 'true');
    activeBtn.style.backgroundColor = '#070808';
  }
  if (activeIcon) activeIcon.setAttribute('fill', '#FAF6F5');

  // Se for rock, some com o botão de TV (opcional, mas recomendado)
  if (normalizedPrefix === 'rock' && tvBtn) {
    tvBtn.style.display = 'none';
  }

  // Atualiza título/descrição
 if (activeBtn) {
    const dataTitle = activeBtn.getAttribute('data-title') || '';
    const dataDescricao = activeBtn.getAttribute('data-descricao') || '';
    const nomeEl = document.getElementById('programacao-name' + prefixoComUnderline);
    const descricaoEl = document.getElementById('programacao-descricao');
    if (nomeEl) nomeEl.textContent = dataTitle;
    if (descricaoEl) descricaoEl.textContent = dataDescricao;
  }
}




// 2) Ao clicar na aba principal "98_rock", garanta FM
document.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
  const rockTab = e.target.closest('.abas-nav a[href="#aba-98_rock"]');
  if (rockTab) {
    // deixa a troca de aba acontecer e em seguida força FM
    setTimeout(function () { showTab_2('FM_rock', '_rock'); }, 0);
  }
});

// 3) (opcional) Se a página já carregar na aba 98_rock, força FM
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  const rockContentVisible = document.querySelector('#aba-98_rock.aba-conteudo[style*="display: block"]');
  if (rockContentVisible) {
    showTab_2('FM_rock', '_rock');
  }
});

document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    
    const likeBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.like-btn');
    const deslikeBtns = document.querySelectorAll('.deslike-btn');

    likeBtns.forEach(function (likeBtn, index) {
        const svg = likeBtn.querySelector('svg');
        const originalSvgHTML = svg.outerHTML;

        const isNews = likeBtn.querySelector('svg.like_news') !== null;
        const fillColor = isNews ? '#000000' : '#ffffff';

        const novoSvgHTML = `
<svg class="like-btn-1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="20" height="21" viewBox="0 0 20 21" fill="none">
  <path d="M17.4993 7.51426C17.9438 7.51426 18.3327 7.68093 18.666 8.01426C18.9993 8.34759 19.166 8.73648 19.166 9.18093V10.8476C19.166 10.9448 19.1556 11.049 19.1348 11.1601C19.1139 11.2712 19.0827 11.3754 19.041 11.4726L16.541 17.3476C16.416 17.6254 16.2077 17.8615 15.916 18.0559C15.6243 18.2504 15.3188 18.3476 14.9993 18.3476H8.33268C7.87435 18.3476 7.48199 18.1844 7.1556 17.858C6.82921 17.5316 6.66602 17.1393 6.66602 16.6809V8.20176C6.66602 7.97954 6.71115 7.76773 6.80143 7.56634C6.89171 7.36496 7.01324 7.18787 7.16602 7.03509L11.6868 2.53509C11.8952 2.34065 12.1417 2.22259 12.4264 2.18093C12.7112 2.13926 12.9855 2.18787 13.2493 2.32676C13.5132 2.46565 13.7042 2.66009 13.8223 2.91009C13.9403 3.16009 13.9646 3.41704 13.8952 3.68093L12.9577 7.51426H17.4993ZM3.33268 18.3476C2.87435 18.3476 2.48199 18.1844 2.1556 17.858C1.82921 17.5316 1.66602 17.1393 1.66602 16.6809V9.18093C1.66602 8.72259 1.82921 8.33023 2.1556 8.00384C2.48199 7.67746 2.87435 7.51426 3.33268 7.51426C3.79102 7.51426 4.18338 7.67746 4.50977 8.00384C4.83615 8.33023 4.99935 8.72259 4.99935 9.18093V16.6809C4.99935 17.1393 4.83615 17.5316 4.50977 17.858C4.18338 18.1844 3.79102 18.3476 3.33268 18.3476Z" fill="${fillColor}"/>
</svg>`;

        let liked = false;

        likeBtn.addEventListener('click', function () {
            // Toggle
            liked = !liked;

            // Desativa deslike correspondente se like for ativado
            const deslikeBtn = deslikeBtns[index];
            if (liked) {
                deslikeBtn.dataset.active = "false";
                const dSvg = deslikeBtn.querySelector('svg');
                const dWrapper = document.createElement('div');
                dWrapper.innerHTML = dSvg.dataset.originalSvg || dSvg.outerHTML;
                deslikeBtn.querySelector('svg').replaceWith(dWrapper.firstElementChild);
            }

            const wrapper = document.createElement('div');
            wrapper.innerHTML = liked ? novoSvgHTML : originalSvgHTML;
            const newSvg = wrapper.firstElementChild;
            newSvg.dataset.originalSvg = originalSvgHTML;
            likeBtn.querySelector('svg').replaceWith(newSvg);

            likeBtn.dataset.active = liked.toString();
        });
    });

    deslikeBtns.forEach(function (deslikeBtn, index) {
        const svg = deslikeBtn.querySelector('svg');
        const originalSvgHTML = svg.outerHTML;

        const isNews = deslikeBtn.querySelector('svg.deslike_news') !== null;
        const fillColor = isNews ? '#000000' : '#ffffff';

        const invertidoSvgHTML = `
<svg class="deslike-btn-1" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" style="transform: rotate(180deg);" width="20" height="21" viewBox="0 0 20 21" fill="none">
  <path d="M17.4993 7.51426C17.9438 7.51426 18.3327 7.68093 18.666 8.01426C18.9993 8.34759 19.166 8.73648 19.166 9.18093V10.8476C19.166 10.9448 19.1556 11.049 19.1348 11.1601C19.1139 11.2712 19.0827 11.3754 19.041 11.4726L16.541 17.3476C16.416 17.6254 16.2077 17.8615 15.916 18.0559C15.6243 18.2504 15.3188 18.3476 14.9993 18.3476H8.33268C7.87435 18.3476 7.48199 18.1844 7.1556 17.858C6.82921 17.5316 6.66602 17.1393 6.66602 16.6809V8.20176C6.66602 7.97954 6.71115 7.76773 6.80143 7.56634C6.89171 7.36496 7.01324 7.18787 7.16602 7.03509L11.6868 2.53509C11.8952 2.34065 12.1417 2.22259 12.4264 2.18093C12.7112 2.13926 12.9855 2.18787 13.2493 2.32676C13.5132 2.46565 13.7042 2.66009 13.8223 2.91009C13.9403 3.16009 13.9646 3.41704 13.8952 3.68093L12.9577 7.51426H17.4993ZM3.33268 18.3476C2.87435 18.3476 2.48199 18.1844 2.1556 17.858C1.82921 17.5316 1.66602 17.1393 1.66602 16.6809V9.18093C1.66602 8.72259 1.82921 8.33023 2.1556 8.00384C2.48199 7.67746 2.87435 7.51426 3.33268 7.51426C3.79102 7.51426 4.18338 7.67746 4.50977 8.00384C4.83615 8.33023 4.99935 8.72259 4.99935 9.18093V16.6809C4.99935 17.1393 4.83615 17.5316 4.50977 17.858C4.18338 18.1844 3.79102 18.3476 3.33268 18.3476Z" fill="${fillColor}"/>
</svg>`;

        let desliked = false;

        deslikeBtn.addEventListener('click', function () {
           
            desliked = !desliked;

           
            const likeBtn = likeBtns[index];
            if (desliked) {
                likeBtn.dataset.active = "false";
                const lSvg = likeBtn.querySelector('svg');
                const lWrapper = document.createElement('div');
                lWrapper.innerHTML = lSvg.dataset.originalSvg || lSvg.outerHTML;
                likeBtn.querySelector('svg').replaceWith(lWrapper.firstElementChild);
            }

            const wrapper = document.createElement('div');
            wrapper.innerHTML = desliked ? invertidoSvgHTML : originalSvgHTML;
            const newSvg = wrapper.firstElementChild;
            newSvg.dataset.originalSvg = originalSvgHTML;
            deslikeBtn.querySelector('svg').replaceWith(newSvg);

            deslikeBtn.dataset.active = desliked.toString();
        });
    });
});

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    const oferecimento = document.getElementById('oferecimento-logo');
    const abas = document.querySelectorAll('.abas-nav a');

    abas.forEach(aba => {
        aba.addEventListener('click', function() {
            const slug = this.getAttribute('data-slug');
            if (slug === '98_' && !true) {
                oferecimento.style.display = 'flex';
            } else {
                oferecimento.style.display = 'none';
            }
        });
    });
});
</script>

<script>
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    const banners = document.querySelectorAll('.banner-esquerda, .banner-direita');
    let alturaFixa = null;

    function getActivePlayer() {
        const radio = document.querySelector('.aba-conteudo[style*="display: block"] .radio-container.responsive-player');
        if (radio && radio.offsetParent !== null) return radio;

        const iframe = document.querySelector('.aba-conteudo[style*="display: block"] iframe');
        if (iframe && iframe.offsetParent !== null) return iframe;

        return null;
    }

    function ajustarAlturaBanners() {
        const player = getActivePlayer();
        if (!player) return;
        const altura = player.offsetHeight;
        banners.forEach(banner => banner.style.height = altura + 'px');
    }

    function capturarAlturaInicial() {
        const player = getActivePlayer();
        if (player && !alturaFixa) {
            setTimeout(() => {
                alturaFixa = player.offsetHeight;
                ajustarAlturaBanners();
            }, 300);
        }
    }

    const resizeObserver = new ResizeObserver(() => ajustarAlturaBanners());

    function observarIframeAtivo() {
        const player = getActivePlayer();
        if (player) {
            resizeObserver.disconnect();
            resizeObserver.observe(player);
        }
    }

    const tabs = document.querySelectorAll('.abas-nav a');
    const contents = document.querySelectorAll('.aba-conteudo');
 

    const bannersData = {"98_":{"esq":false,"link_esq":"https:\/\/go.aff.estrelabetpartners.com\/v4610ygz?campaign_id=19491&utm_source=radio98&utm_campaign=se-tem-hit-tem-estrela","dir":false,"link_dir":"https:\/\/go.aff.estrelabetpartners.com\/v4610ygz?campaign_id=19491&utm_source=radio98&utm_campaign=se-tem-hit-tem-estrela","ativa":false,"bkg_ld_esq":"#000033","bkg_ld_dir":"#000033","bkg_ld_mobile":"#000033","mobile":{"ID":80298,"id":80298,"title":"Estrela-Bet-Logo-2022-Preta","filename":"Estrela-Bet-Logo-2022-Preta.png","filesize":17665,"url":"https:\/\/98site-assets.s3.amazonaws.com\/wp-content\/uploads\/2026\/02\/09133542\/Estrela-Bet-Logo-2022-Preta.png","link":"https:\/\/rede98.com.br\/estrela-bet-logo-2022-preta\/","alt":"","author":"1","description":"","caption":"","name":"estrela-bet-logo-2022-preta","status":"inherit","uploaded_to":0,"date":"2026-02-09     function extrairUrlImagem(imagem) {
        if (!imagem) return '';
        if (typeof imagem === 'object' && imagem.url) return imagem.url;
        if (typeof imagem === 'string') return imagem;
        return '';
    }
 function extrairAltImagem(imagem) {
    if (!imagem) return '';
    if (typeof imagem === 'object' && imagem.alt) return imagem.alt;
    return '';
}


    function pauseAndResetMediaIn(element) {
        if (!element) return;
        element.querySelectorAll('audio, video').forEach(media => media.pause());
        element.querySelectorAll('iframe').forEach(iframe => {
            iframe.dataset.originalSrc = iframe.dataset.originalSrc || iframe.src;
            iframe.src = '';
        });
    }

    function restoreMediaIn(element) {
        if (!element) return;
        element.querySelectorAll('iframe').forEach(iframe => {
            if (iframe.dataset.originalSrc) iframe.src = iframe.dataset.originalSrc;
        });
    }

    function atualizarBanners(slug) {
        const containerEsq = document.querySelector('.banner-esquerda');
        const containerDir = document.querySelector('.banner-direita');
        const bannerMobileContainer = document.querySelector('.banner-mobile');

        const data = bannersData[slug] || {};
        const ativa = data.ativa || false;
        const bannerEsq = data.esq || null;
        const bannerDir = data.dir || null;
        const bannerMobile = data.mobile || null;
        const linkEsq = data.link_esq || '#';
        const linkDir = data.link_dir || '#';
        const linkMobile = data.link_mobile || '#';

        const bgEsq = data.bkg_ld_esq || '#000';
        const bgDir = data.bkg_ld_dir || '#000';
        const bgMobile = data.bkg_ld_mobile || '#000';

        // Banner Esquerdo
        if (containerEsq) {
            const url = ativa ? extrairUrlImagem(bannerEsq) : null;
            containerEsq.innerHTML = url 
                ? `<a href="${linkEsq}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><img decoding="async" src="${url}" alt="Banner Esquerdo"></a>`
                : `<div class="banner-fallback" style="background:${bgEsq};"></div>`;
            containerEsq.style.backgroundColor = bgEsq;
            containerEsq.style.display = 'flex';
        }

        // Banner Direito
        if (containerDir) {
            const url = ativa ? extrairUrlImagem(bannerDir) : null;
            containerDir.innerHTML = url
                ? `<a href="${linkDir}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><img decoding="async" src="${url}" alt="Banner Direito"></a>`
                : `<div class="banner-fallback" style="background:${bgDir};"></div>`;
            containerDir.style.backgroundColor = bgDir;
            containerDir.style.display = 'flex';
        }

        // Banner Mobile
        if (bannerMobileContainer) {
            const url = ativa ? extrairUrlImagem(bannerMobile) : null;
          
            bannerMobileContainer.style.backgroundColor = bgMobile;
			console.log(bannerMobileContainer);
            if (url) {
                bannerMobileContainer.innerHTML = linkMobile
                    ? `<a href="${linkMobile}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><img decoding="async" src="${url}" alt="Banner Mobile"></a>`
                    : `<img decoding="async" src="${url}" alt="Banner Mobile">`;
                bannerMobileContainer.style.display = 'block';
            } else {
                bannerMobileContainer.innerHTML = '';
                bannerMobileContainer.style.display = 'none';
            }
        }


    }

    let activeTab = document.querySelector('.abas-nav a.active');

    if (!activeTab) {
        activeTab = document.querySelector('.abas-nav a');
        if (activeTab) {
            activeTab.classList.add('active');
            const targetId = activeTab.getAttribute('href').replace('#', '');
            const targetContent = document.getElementById(targetId);
            if (targetContent) targetContent.style.display = 'block';
        }
    }

    if (activeTab) {
        const slugInicial = activeTab.getAttribute('href').replace('#aba-', '');
        atualizarBanners(slugInicial);
    }

    tabs.forEach(tab => {
        tab.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
            e.preventDefault();
            const href = this.getAttribute('href');
            const targetId = href.replace('#', '');
            const targetContent = document.getElementById(targetId);
            const slug = href.replace('#aba-', '');

            if (this === activeTab) return;

            tabs.forEach(el => el.classList.remove('active'));
            contents.forEach(el => {
                if (el.style.display === 'block') pauseAndResetMediaIn(el);
                el.style.display = 'none';
            });

            this.classList.add('active');
            if (targetContent) {
                targetContent.style.display = 'block';
                restoreMediaIn(targetContent);
            }

            atualizarBanners(slug);
            activeTab = this;

            ajustarAlturaBanners();
            observarIframeAtivo();
        });
    });

    capturarAlturaInicial();
    ajustarAlturaBanners();
    observarIframeAtivo();
    window.addEventListener('resize', ajustarAlturaBanners);
});
</script>

    <script>
      document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
    document.querySelectorAll('.video-item').forEach((item) => {
        item.addEventListener('click', function () {
            const url = this.getAttribute('data-url');
            const title = this.getAttribute('data-title');

            // Cria um novo iframe com autoplay
            const autoplayUrl = url.includes('?') ? url + '&autoplay=1' : url + '?autoplay=1';
            const iframe = document.createElement('iframe');
            iframe.id = 'video-frame';
            iframe.src = autoplayUrl;
            iframe.setAttribute('frameborder', '0');
            iframe.setAttribute('allowfullscreen', '');
            iframe.setAttribute('allow', 'autoplay');

            // Substitui o iframe antigo dentro de .video-wrapper
            const wrapper = document.querySelector('.video-wrapper');
            const oldIframe = wrapper.querySelector('iframe');
            if (oldIframe) {
                wrapper.replaceChild(iframe, oldIframe);
            }

            // Atualiza o título do vídeo
            document.getElementById('video-title').innerText = title;

            // Atualiza os estados visuais dos itens
            document.querySelectorAll('.video-item').forEach(el => {
                el.classList.remove('active');
                el.querySelector('.watching-label')?.remove();

                if (!el.querySelector('.watching-icon')) {
                    const wrapper = el.querySelector('.thumb-wrapper');
                    const icon = document.createElement('div');
                    icon.classList.add('watching-icon');
                    icon.innerHTML = `<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="28" height="28" viewBox="0 0 28 28" fill="none">
                      <mask id="mask0" style="mask-type:alpha" maskUnits="userSpaceOnUse" x="0" y="0" width="28" height="29">
                        <rect y="0.5" width="28" height="28" fill="#D9D9D9"/>
                      </mask>
                      <g mask="url(#mask0)">
                        <path d="M21.623 13.8212C22.3475 14.241 22.3475 15.2871 21.623 15.7068L10.9689 21.8796C10.2424 22.3005 9.33301 21.7763 9.33301 20.9368L9.33301 8.59124C9.33301 7.75172 10.2424 7.22758 10.9689 7.64844L21.623 13.8212Z" fill="#FAF6F5"/>
                      </g>
                    </svg>`;
                    wrapper.appendChild(icon);
                }
            });

            this.classList.add('active');
            this.querySelector('.watching-icon')?.remove();

            const label = document.createElement('div');
            label.classList.add('watching-label');
            label.textContent = 'Assistindo';
            this.querySelector('.thumb-wrapper').appendChild(label);
        });
    });
});

    </script>

<script type="speculationrules">
{"prefetch":[{"source":"document","where":{"and":[{"href_matches":"/*"},{"not":{"href_matches":["/wp-*.php","/wp-admin/*","/wp-content/uploads/*","/wp-content/*","/wp-content/plugins/*","/wp-content/themes/hello-elementor-child/*","/wp-content/themes/hello-elementor/*","/*\\?(.+)"]}},{"not":{"selector_matches":"a[rel~=\"nofollow\"]"}},{"not":{"selector_matches":".no-prefetch, .no-prefetch a"}}]},"eagerness":"conservative"}]}

    <script>
        jQuery(document).ready(function ($) {
            var ajaxurl = "https://rede98.com.br/wp-admin/admin-ajax.php";
            var postID = 30792;

            $(document).on("click", "#load-more-videos", function () {
                var button = $(this);
                var page = button.data("page");

                // Se for mobile, apenas exibe os vídeos ocultos e esconde o botão
                if ($(window).width() <= 768) {
                    $(".related-video-card").show();
                    button.hide();
                    return;
                }

                $.ajax({
                    url: ajaxurl,
                    type: "POST",
                    data: {
                        action: "load_more_videos",
                        page: page,
                        post_id: postID
                    },
                    success: function (response) {
                        if ($.trim(response) !== "") {
                            $("#related-videos").append(response);
                            button.data("page", page + 1);
                        } else {
                            button.hide();
                        }
                    }
                });
            });
        });
    </script>
    <style>
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
            .related-video-card:nth-child(n+5) {
                display: none;
            }
        }
    </style>

					<script>
				const lazyloadRunObserver = () => {
					const lazyloadBackgrounds = document.querySelectorAll( `.e-con.e-parent:not(.e-lazyloaded)` );
					const lazyloadBackgroundObserver = new IntersectionObserver( ( entries ) => {
						entries.forEach( ( entry ) => {
							if ( entry.isIntersecting ) {
								let lazyloadBackground = entry.target;
								if( lazyloadBackground ) {
									lazyloadBackground.classList.add( 'e-lazyloaded' );
								}
								lazyloadBackgroundObserver.unobserve( entry.target );
							}
						});
					}, { rootMargin: '200px 0px 200px 0px' } );
					lazyloadBackgrounds.forEach( ( lazyloadBackground ) => {
						lazyloadBackgroundObserver.observe( lazyloadBackground );
					} );
				};
				const events = [
					'DOMContentLoaded',
					'elementor/lazyload/observe',
				];
				events.forEach( ( event ) => {
					document.addEventListener( event, lazyloadRunObserver );
				} );
			</script>
			<script>document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function () {
  const copyIcons = document.querySelectorAll('.copy-link');

  copyIcons.forEach(icon => {
    icon.style.cursor = 'pointer';

    icon.addEventListener('click', function (e) {
      e.preventDefault();

      const urlAtual = window.location.href;

      if (navigator.share) {
        navigator.share({
          title: document.title,
          text: 'Confira este link:',
          url: urlAtual
        }).catch((error) => {
          console.error('Erro ao compartilhar:', error);
        });
      } else {
      
        navigator.clipboard.writeText(urlAtual).then(() => {
          alert('Link copiado para a área de transferência!');
        }).catch(() => {
          alert('Não foi possível copiar o link.');
        });
      }
    });
  });
});
</script><link rel='stylesheet' id='e-motion-fx-css' href='https://rede98.com.br/wp-content/plugins/elementor-pro/assets/css/modules/motion-fx.css?ver=3.33.2' media='all' />

<script id="elementor-pro-frontend-js-before">
var ElementorProFrontendConfig = {"ajaxurl":"https:\/\/rede98.com.br\/wp-admin\/admin-ajax.php","nonce":"1dad9bd84b","urls":{"assets":"https:\/\/rede98.com.br\/wp-content\/plugins\/elementor-pro\/assets\/","rest":"https:\/\/rede98.com.br\/wp-json\/"},"settings":{"lazy_load_background_images":true},"popup":{"hasPopUps":true},"shareButtonsNetworks":{"facebook":{"title":"Facebook","has_counter":true},"twitter":{"title":"Twitter"},"linkedin":{"title":"LinkedIn","has_counter":true},"pinterest":{"title":"Pinterest","has_counter":true},"reddit":{"title":"Reddit","has_counter":true},"vk":{"title":"VK","has_counter":true},"odnoklassniki":{"title":"OK","has_counter":true},"tumblr":{"title":"Tumblr"},"digg":{"title":"Digg"},"skype":{"title":"Skype"},"stumbleupon":{"title":"StumbleUpon","has_counter":true},"mix":{"title":"Mix"},"telegram":{"title":"Telegram"},"pocket":{"title":"Pocket","has_counter":true},"xing":{"title":"XING","has_counter":true},"whatsapp":{"title":"WhatsApp"},"email":{"title":"Email"},"print":{"title":"Print"},"x-twitter":{"title":"X"},"threads":{"title":"Threads"}},"facebook_sdk":{"lang":"pt_BR","app_id":""},"lottie":{"defaultAnimationUrl":"https:\/\/rede98.com.br\/wp-content\/plugins\/elementor-pro\/modules\/lottie\/assets\/animations\/default.json"}};

<script src="https://rede98.com.br/wp-content/plugins/elementor-pro/assets/js/frontend.js?ver=3.33.2" id="elementor-pro-frontend-js"></script>
<script src="https://rede98.com.br/wp-content/plugins/elementor-pro/assets/js/elements-handlers.js?ver=3.33.2" id="pro-elements-handlers-js"></script>
<script id="wp-emoji-settings" type="application/json">
{"baseUrl":"https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/17.0.2/72x72/","ext":".png","svgUrl":"https://s.w.org/images/core/emoji/17.0.2/svg/","svgExt":".svg","source":{"wpemoji":"https://rede98.com.br/wp-includes/js/wp-emoji.js?ver=5ab6402ae28a60050953c17324cc0126","twemoji":"https://rede98.com.br/wp-includes/js/twemoji.js?ver=5ab6402ae28a60050953c17324cc0126"}}
</script>
<script type="module">
/**
 * @output wp-includes/js/wp-emoji-loader.js
 */

/* eslint-env es6 */

// Note: This is loaded as a script module, so there is no need for an IIFE to prevent pollution of the global scope.

/**
 * Emoji Settings as exported in PHP via _print_emoji_detection_script().
 * @typedef WPEmojiSettings
 * @type {object}
 * @property {?object} source
 * @property {?string} source.concatemoji
 * @property {?string} source.twemoji
 * @property {?string} source.wpemoji
 */

const settings = /** @type {WPEmojiSettings} */ (
	JSON.parse( document.getElementById( 'wp-emoji-settings' ).textContent )
);

// For compatibility with other scripts that read from this global, in particular wp-includes/js/wp-emoji.js (source file: js/_enqueues/wp/emoji.js).
window._wpemojiSettings = settings;

/**
 * Support tests.
 * @typedef SupportTests
 * @type {object}
 * @property {?boolean} flag
 * @property {?boolean} emoji
 */

const sessionStorageKey = 'wpEmojiSettingsSupports';
const tests = [ 'flag', 'emoji' ];

/**
 * Checks whether the browser supports offloading to a Worker.
 *
 * @since 6.3.0
 *
 * @private
 *
 * @returns {boolean}
 */
function supportsWorkerOffloading() {
	return (
		typeof Worker !== 'undefined' &&
		typeof OffscreenCanvas !== 'undefined' &&
		typeof URL !== 'undefined' &&
		URL.createObjectURL &&
		typeof Blob !== 'undefined'
	);
}

/**
 * @typedef SessionSupportTests
 * @type {object}
 * @property {number} timestamp
 * @property {SupportTests} supportTests
 */

/**
 * Get support tests from session.
 *
 * @since 6.3.0
 *
 * @private
 *
 * @returns {?SupportTests} Support tests, or null if not set or older than 1 week.
 */
function getSessionSupportTests() {
	try {
		/** @type {SessionSupportTests} */
		const item = JSON.parse(
			sessionStorage.getItem( sessionStorageKey )
		);
		if (
			typeof item === 'object' &&
			typeof item.timestamp === 'number' &&
			new Date().valueOf() < item.timestamp + 604800 && // Note: Number is a week in seconds.
			typeof item.supportTests === 'object'
		) {
			return item.supportTests;
		}
	} catch ( e ) {}
	return null;
}

/**
 * Persist the supports in session storage.
 *
 * @since 6.3.0
 *
 * @private
 *
 * @param {SupportTests} supportTests Support tests.
 */
function setSessionSupportTests( supportTests ) {
	try {
		/** @type {SessionSupportTests} */
		const item = {
			supportTests: supportTests,
			timestamp: new Date().valueOf()
		};

		sessionStorage.setItem(
			sessionStorageKey,
			JSON.stringify( item )
		);
	} catch ( e ) {}
}

/**
 * Checks if two sets of Emoji characters render the same visually.
 *
 * This is used to determine if the browser is rendering an emoji with multiple data points
 * correctly. set1 is the emoji in the correct form, using a zero-width joiner. set2 is the emoji
 * in the incorrect form, using a zero-width space. If the two sets render the same, then the browser
 * does not support the emoji correctly.
 *
 * This function may be serialized to run in a Worker. Therefore, it cannot refer to variables from the containing
 * scope. Everything must be passed by parameters.
 *
 * @since 4.9.0
 *
 * @private
 *
 * @param {CanvasRenderingContext2D} context 2D Context.
 * @param {string} set1 Set of Emoji to test.
 * @param {string} set2 Set of Emoji to test.
 *
 * @return {boolean} True if the two sets render the same.
 */
function emojiSetsRenderIdentically( context, set1, set2 ) {
	// Cleanup from previous test.
	context.clearRect( 0, 0, context.canvas.width, context.canvas.height );
	context.fillText( set1, 0, 0 );
	const rendered1 = new Uint32Array(
		context.getImageData(
			0,
			0,
			context.canvas.width,
			context.canvas.height
		).data
	);

	// Cleanup from previous test.
	context.clearRect( 0, 0, context.canvas.width, context.canvas.height );
	context.fillText( set2, 0, 0 );
	const rendered2 = new Uint32Array(
		context.getImageData(
			0,
			0,
			context.canvas.width,
			context.canvas.height
		).data
	);

	return rendered1.every( ( rendered2Data, index ) => {
		return rendered2Data === rendered2[ index ];
	} );
}

/**
 * Checks if the center point of a single emoji is empty.
 *
 * This is used to determine if the browser is rendering an emoji with a single data point
 * correctly. The center point of an incorrectly rendered emoji will be empty. A correctly
 * rendered emoji will have a non-zero value at the center point.
 *
 * This function may be serialized to run in a Worker. Therefore, it cannot refer to variables from the containing
 * scope. Everything must be passed by parameters.
 *
 * @since 6.8.2
 *
 * @private
 *
 * @param {CanvasRenderingContext2D} context 2D Context.
 * @param {string} emoji Emoji to test.
 *
 * @return {boolean} True if the center point is empty.
 */
function emojiRendersEmptyCenterPoint( context, emoji ) {
	// Cleanup from previous test.
	context.clearRect( 0, 0, context.canvas.width, context.canvas.height );
	context.fillText( emoji, 0, 0 );

	// Test if the center point (16, 16) is empty (0,0,0,0).
	const centerPoint = context.getImageData(16, 16, 1, 1);
	for ( let i = 0; i < centerPoint.data.length; i++ ) {
		if ( centerPoint.data[ i ] !== 0 ) {
			// Stop checking the moment it's known not to be empty.
			return false;
		}
	}

	return true;
}

/**
 * Determines if the browser properly renders Emoji that Twemoji can supplement.
 *
 * This function may be serialized to run in a Worker. Therefore, it cannot refer to variables from the containing
 * scope. Everything must be passed by parameters.
 *
 * @since 4.2.0
 *
 * @private
 *
 * @param {CanvasRenderingContext2D} context 2D Context.
 * @param {string} type Whether to test for support of "flag" or "emoji".
 * @param {Function} emojiSetsRenderIdentically Reference to emojiSetsRenderIdentically function, needed due to minification.
 * @param {Function} emojiRendersEmptyCenterPoint Reference to emojiRendersEmptyCenterPoint function, needed due to minification.
 *
 * @return {boolean} True if the browser can render emoji, false if it cannot.
 */
function browserSupportsEmoji( context, type, emojiSetsRenderIdentically, emojiRendersEmptyCenterPoint ) {
	let isIdentical;

	switch ( type ) {
		case 'flag':
			/*
			 * Test for Transgender flag compatibility. Added in Unicode 13.
			 *
			 * To test for support, we try to render it, and compare the rendering to how it would look if
			 * the browser doesn't render it correctly (white flag emoji + transgender symbol).
			 */
			isIdentical = emojiSetsRenderIdentically(
				context,
				'\uD83C\uDFF3\uFE0F\u200D\u26A7\uFE0F', // as a zero-width joiner sequence
				'\uD83C\uDFF3\uFE0F\u200B\u26A7\uFE0F' // separated by a zero-width space
			);

			if ( isIdentical ) {
				return false;
			}

			/*
			 * Test for Sark flag compatibility. This is the least supported of the letter locale flags,
			 * so gives us an easy test for full support.
			 *
			 * To test for support, we try to render it, and compare the rendering to how it would look if
			 * the browser doesn't render it correctly ([C] + [Q]).
			 */
			isIdentical = emojiSetsRenderIdentically(
				context,
				'\uD83C\uDDE8\uD83C\uDDF6', // as the sequence of two code points
				'\uD83C\uDDE8\u200B\uD83C\uDDF6' // as the two code points separated by a zero-width space
			);

			if ( isIdentical ) {
				return false;
			}

			/*
			 * Test for English flag compatibility. England is a country in the United Kingdom, it
			 * does not have a two letter locale code but rather a five letter sub-division code.
			 *
			 * To test for support, we try to render it, and compare the rendering to how it would look if
			 * the browser doesn't render it correctly (black flag emoji + [G] + [B] + [E] + [N] + [G]).
			 */
			isIdentical = emojiSetsRenderIdentically(
				context,
				// as the flag sequence
				'\uD83C\uDFF4\uDB40\uDC67\uDB40\uDC62\uDB40\uDC65\uDB40\uDC6E\uDB40\uDC67\uDB40\uDC7F',
				// with each code point separated by a zero-width space
				'\uD83C\uDFF4\u200B\uDB40\uDC67\u200B\uDB40\uDC62\u200B\uDB40\uDC65\u200B\uDB40\uDC6E\u200B\uDB40\uDC67\u200B\uDB40\uDC7F'
			);

			return ! isIdentical;
		case 'emoji':
			/*
			 * Is there a large, hairy, humanoid mythical creature living in the browser?
			 *
			 * To test for Emoji 17.0 support, try to render a new emoji: Hairy Creature.
			 *
			 * The hairy creature emoji is a single code point emoji. Testing for browser
			 * support required testing the center point of the emoji to see if it is empty.
			 *
			 * 0xD83E 0x1FAC8 (\uD83E\u1FAC8) == 🫈 Hairy creature.
			 *
			 * When updating this test, please ensure that the emoji is either a single code point
			 * or switch to using the emojiSetsRenderIdentically function and testing with a zero-width
			 * joiner vs a zero-width space.
			 */
			const notSupported = emojiRendersEmptyCenterPoint( context, '\uD83E\u1FAC8' );
			return ! notSupported;
	}

	return false;
}

/**
 * Checks emoji support tests.
 *
 * This function may be serialized to run in a Worker. Therefore, it cannot refer to variables from the containing
 * scope. Everything must be passed by parameters.
 *
 * @since 6.3.0
 *
 * @private
 *
 * @param {string[]} tests Tests.
 * @param {Function} browserSupportsEmoji Reference to browserSupportsEmoji function, needed due to minification.
 * @param {Function} emojiSetsRenderIdentically Reference to emojiSetsRenderIdentically function, needed due to minification.
 * @param {Function} emojiRendersEmptyCenterPoint Reference to emojiRendersEmptyCenterPoint function, needed due to minification.
 *
 * @return {SupportTests} Support tests.
 */
function testEmojiSupports( tests, browserSupportsEmoji, emojiSetsRenderIdentically, emojiRendersEmptyCenterPoint ) {
	let canvas;
	if (
		typeof WorkerGlobalScope !== 'undefined' &&
		self instanceof WorkerGlobalScope
	) {
		canvas = new OffscreenCanvas( 300, 150 ); // Dimensions are default for HTMLCanvasElement.
	} else {
		canvas = document.createElement( 'canvas' );
	}

	const context = canvas.getContext( '2d', { willReadFrequently: true } );

	/*
	 * Chrome on OS X added native emoji rendering in M41. Unfortunately,
	 * it doesn't work when the font is bolder than 500 weight. So, we
	 * check for bold rendering support to avoid invisible emoji in Chrome.
	 */
	context.textBaseline = 'top';
	context.font = '600 32px Arial';

	const supports = {};
	tests.forEach( ( test ) => {
		supports[ test ] = browserSupportsEmoji( context, test, emojiSetsRenderIdentically, emojiRendersEmptyCenterPoint );
	} );
	return supports;
}

/**
 * Adds a script to the head of the document.
 *
 * @ignore
 *
 * @since 4.2.0
 *
 * @param {string} src The url where the script is located.
 *
 * @return {void}
 */
function addScript( src ) {
	const script = document.createElement( 'script' );
	script.src = src;
	script.defer = true;
	document.head.appendChild( script );
}

settings.supports = {
	everything: true,
	everythingExceptFlag: true
};

// Obtain the emoji support from the browser, asynchronously when possible.
new Promise( ( resolve ) => {
	let supportTests = getSessionSupportTests();
	if ( supportTests ) {
		resolve( supportTests );
		return;
	}

	if ( supportsWorkerOffloading() ) {
		try {
			// Note that the functions are being passed as arguments due to minification.
			const workerScript =
				'postMessage(' +
				testEmojiSupports.toString() +
				'(' +
				[
					JSON.stringify( tests ),
					browserSupportsEmoji.toString(),
					emojiSetsRenderIdentically.toString(),
					emojiRendersEmptyCenterPoint.toString()
				].join( ',' ) +
				'));';
			const blob = new Blob( [ workerScript ], {
				type: 'text/javascript'
			} );
			const worker = new Worker( URL.createObjectURL( blob ), { name: 'wpTestEmojiSupports' } );
			worker.onmessage = ( event ) => {
				supportTests = event.data;
				setSessionSupportTests( supportTests );
				worker.terminate();
				resolve( supportTests );
			};
			return;
		} catch ( e ) {}
	}

	supportTests = testEmojiSupports( tests, browserSupportsEmoji, emojiSetsRenderIdentically, emojiRendersEmptyCenterPoint );
	setSessionSupportTests( supportTests );
	resolve( supportTests );
} )
	// Once the browser emoji support has been obtained from the session, finalize the settings.
	.then( ( supportTests ) => {
		/*
		 * Tests the browser support for flag emojis and other emojis, and adjusts the
		 * support settings accordingly.
		 */
		for ( const test in supportTests ) {
			settings.supports[ test ] = supportTests[ test ];

			settings.supports.everything =
				settings.supports.everything && settings.supports[ test ];

			if ( 'flag' !== test ) {
				settings.supports.everythingExceptFlag =
					settings.supports.everythingExceptFlag &&
					settings.supports[ test ];
			}
		}

		settings.supports.everythingExceptFlag =
			settings.supports.everythingExceptFlag &&
			! settings.supports.flag;

		// When the browser can not render everything we need to load a polyfill.
		if ( ! settings.supports.everything ) {
			const src = settings.source || {};

			if ( src.concatemoji ) {
				addScript( src.concatemoji );
			} else if ( src.wpemoji && src.twemoji ) {
				addScript( src.twemoji );
				addScript( src.wpemoji );
			}
		}
	} );
//# sourceURL=https://rede98.com.br/wp-includes/js/wp-emoji-loader.js
</script>
